description:
No visual affordance that the assistant is still typing. The message simply grows, which reads as teleportation rather than composition.

**Fix:** `StreamingCursor` component renders inline after the tail segment while `isComplete === false`. CSS keyframe animation (`opacity: 1 → 0 → 1` at ~1Hz) via Tailwind config extension. Fully unmounted (not hidden) when `isComplete` flips to `true`. No JS animation loop.

**Files to modify:**
- `apps/ava/src/components/chat/StreamingCursor.tsx` — create: cursor component using @protolabsai/ui primitives
- `apps/ava/src/components/chat/SegmentedMessage.tsx` — append `<StreamingCursor isComplete={isComplete} />` after tail segment
- `apps/ava/tailwind.config.ts` — add `streaming-blink` keyframe and animation utility
- `apps/ava/src/components/chat/MessageBubble.tsx` — thread `isComplete` down if not already

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Cursor blinks at ~1Hz during streaming (CSS only, no JS animation)
- Cursor fully unmounted on `isComplete` flip (verified via React DevTools — not hidden, removed)
- Uses only @protolabsai/ui text primitives and Tailwind utilities — no hardcoded colors, no bare `<span>`
- No reflow or layout shift when cursor appears/disappears (inline-block placement)
- Build passes, all tests pass

**Complexity:** small
